Operation 'createZeiterfassung' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is too minimal and lacks essential details for AI agent decision-making. The improved description clarifies: (1) what inputs are expected (time details, project/task associations), (2) what is returned (created object with ID), (3) side effects (entry is recorded and available for billing/reporting), and (4) uses consistent domain terminology (Zeiterfassung, project association). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Create a new time tracking entry.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new time tracking entry (Zeiterfassung) for recording work hours. Accepts time entry details including start time, end time, duration, project association, and optional task reference. Returns the created Zeiterfassung object with assigned ID and timestamp. The entry is immediately recorded in the system and can be used for project billing and time reporting.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal and lacks essential details for AI agent decision-making. The improved description clarifies: (1) what inputs are expected (time details, project/task associations), (2) what is returned (created object with ID), (3) side effects (entry is recorded and available for billing/reporting), and (4) uses consistent domain terminology (Zeiterfassung, project association). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.
